message:
feat(macros): add phone, contains, starts_with, ends_with validators; rustfmt cleanup

**New Validators (validate.rs, 121 new lines):**
- phone: validates phone number format (7-15 digits, allows +/-/spaces/parens)
- contains: asserts string contains a substring
- starts_with: asserts string starts with a prefix
- ends_with: asserts string ends with a suffix
- All validators generate proper ValidationError with location tracking

**Formatting Cleanup (rustfmt across 9 files):**
- context.rs: reformatted long assert! messages into multi-line format
- extract.rs: reordered use statements (Arc before atomic imports)
- request.rs: reformatted long assertions, collapsed single-element vec literals
- expect.rs: reformatted assert!(matches!()) calls, wrapped long insert() chains
- server.rs: minor formatting
- streaming.rs: formatting adjustments
- route.rs: reformatted route macro code generation
- spec.rs: simplified OpenAPI spec formatting
- snapshot_tests.rs: test formatting cleanup

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
